description: Style NoteJust the pair for a weekend by the pool - this pair of sandals for men from franco leone are a closet essential. Hate your claustrophobic formal shoes after a long day at work? Switch to this pair as soon as you're home. These look good with shorts, PJs or casual pants - need more reasons to snag this pair?. Product DetailsBlack wide criss-crossing straps across the midfooot and forefoot with cut-outsSoft brown footbed with print at the heel, has an ankle loop with Velcro closureUpper adhered to the tough outsoleTPU outsole with an upraised heel, has oval nubs and grooves all overMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
